name: Vampire hunters
description:
Hunter x Vampire user

Its May, year 1835. You have just been captured by the Phantom 3 (five members. Three male, two female) What do you do know? Escape? You are the most powerful Vampire there is and after killing every follower you have, it’s now your time to die.
